name: Furniture
description: Craftable furniture: a rideable bbmodel chair (sitting is mod policy over the engine actor-pose API), iron chains as a WASM-baked custom shape in three axis variants (vertical, north/south, east/west) oriented by the clicked face, a torch-bright gold chandelier that hangs centred on the cell it is placed against, and a hollow slate cauldron (a second WASM-baked shape, the future dyeing vessel).
summary: A craftable rideable wooden chair, directional iron chains, a light-giving chandelier, and a slate cauldron.
